gaps.name: object_to_readout_compatibility
gaps.why_open: shared object manifold to discriminative geometry compatibility
gaps.needed_next_move: validate operator-form changes beyond local gain tuning

gaps.name: stress_bound_dynamic_update_closure
gaps.why_open: novelty, retention, and switching are not yet jointly closed in one validated dynamic law
gaps.needed_next_move: run stronger novelty-retention-switching coupled update benchmarks

gaps.name: bridge_role_dense_coupling
gaps.why_open: bridge-role dynamics are filtered correctly, but not yet densely coupled into system-level closure
gaps.needed_next_move: turn filtered bridge families into dense dynamic bridge benchmarks

gaps.name: brain_side_causal_closure
gaps.why_open: causal integration and falsification readout are still needed
gaps.needed_next_move: convert executed probes into a causal falsification report and intervention tests

gaps.name: reasoning_slice_engineering_integration
gaps.why_open: reasoning slices are formalized, but not yet integrated into engineering-side operator benchmarks
gaps.needed_next_move: bind reasoning-slice laws to readout, bridge, and brain-side predictions

verdict.core_answer: The remaining hard problems are now concentrated in a small set of encoding-mechanism gaps rather than spread across many unrelated theories.
verdict.next_theory_target: drive every next engineering step by one of these named encoding gaps.
